project: Houspire Budget Generator — 18 Enhancements across 4 Tiers

stories.title: Unified flow — always generate Excel + PDF together
acceptanceCriteria: Output format selector (Step 5) removed from page.tsx
Generate button always produces both Excel and BOQ PDF simultaneously
Downloads section shows Excel + PDF + WhatsApp share on every generation
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: GST toggle
acceptanceCriteria: Checkbox 'Include GST (18%)' shown in Step 1 client details
When enabled, BOQ Excel gets a GST row = 18% of total
GST row labelled separately, not bundled with line items
PDF also shows GST total when enabled
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Payment milestone schedule
acceptanceCriteria: After BOQ generated, show Payment Schedule section below downloads
Schedule: Advance 30%, Material delivery 30%, Mid-execution 30%, Completion 10%
Each milestone shows amount in INR based on BOQ total
Copy as text button for WhatsApp sharing
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Phase-wise BOQ
acceptanceCriteria: BOQ table has Phase column grouping items: Phase 1 Civil/Flooring, Phase 2 Carpentry, Phase 3 Electrical/MEP/HVAC, Phase 4 Soft Furnishings
Phase totals shown as subtotals in table
Phase grouping applied in PDF output
Phase filter dropdown to view one phase at a time
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Client approval flow — shareable link
acceptanceCriteria: GET /approve/[projectId] public page shows read-only BOQ for client
Page shows client name, city, BOQ table, total, vendor list
Approve button sends POST to /api/projects/[id]/approve, sets status=approved in DB
projects table gets status column (draft/shared/approved)
Share link button copies URL to clipboard
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Quantity calculator from dimensions
acceptanceCriteria: After room analysis, show dimension inputs: length (ft) x width (ft) per room
Auto-calculate floor sqft, wall rft, ceiling sqft from dimensions
Pre-fill estimated_sqft from dimensions if provided
Show calculated quantities next to each room card
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Design style auto-detection
acceptanceCriteria: room-analyzer.ts detects style: modern/contemporary/traditional/industrial/minimalist
style field added to RoomAnalysis type
Detected style shown as badge on room card (Step 4)
BOQ system prompt receives style context to adjust finish/material recommendations
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Smart gap detection
acceptanceCriteria: After BOQ generated, check for missing critical items per room type
Missing items shown as amber warning badges (e.g. 'Living Room: no false ceiling detected')
Gap rules: bedroom needs wardrobe+AC; living needs false ceiling+AC; kitchen needs countertop; bath needs waterproofing
One-click 'Add missing item' button appends to BOQ
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Cost optimization suggestions
acceptanceCriteria: After BOQ generated, show Savings section with 3-5 suggestions
Each suggestion: item name, current spec, cheaper alternative, potential saving in INR
Examples: Morbi tiles instead of Kajaria saves X, Anchor switches instead of Legrand saves Y
Accept/Reject buttons per suggestion — accepting updates BOQ row
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Alternative materials per line item
acceptanceCriteria: Each BOQ row has an expand button showing 2 alternatives: Budget (lower spec) and Premium (higher spec)
Each alternative shows different brand, rate, and delta from current
Clicking an alternative swaps the row
Swap updates editedBoqRows state
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Budget vs actual tracking
acceptanceCriteria: On project detail/download page, show 'Enter Actual Cost' input
projects table gets actual_total_inr column
When actual entered, show variance: estimated vs actual, % over/under
Variance shown in green (under budget) or red (over budget)
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Email delivery of BOQ PDF
acceptanceCriteria: Email input field in downloads section
Send PDF button calls POST /api/send-boq with recipient email
Uses Resend API (RESEND_API_KEY env var) to email PDF attachment
Success/error toast shown
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Work order generation per contractor
acceptanceCriteria: GET /api/download/work-order?id=<projectId>&phase=<phase> endpoint
Returns Excel with only that phase's BOQ rows
Header: project name, city, phase name, date
Work order buttons per phase in downloads section
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Vendor shortlist per project
acceptanceCriteria: vendor_shortlist table: project_id, vendor_id (from vendors_db), category
Pin icon on each vendor row in vendor preview — click to shortlist
Shortlisted vendors shown first in vendor list with 📌 badge
Shortlist persists to DB and survives page refresh
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Project analytics dashboard
acceptanceCriteria: /analytics page showing: total projects, avg BOQ value by city, projects by tier, top 5 categories by spend
Bar chart (using plain CSS, no chart library) showing city distribution
Recent 10 projects table with client, city, total, date
Link from header navigation
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: PWA manifest
acceptanceCriteria: public/manifest.json with name, short_name, icons, theme_color=#1B4D3E
app/layout.tsx links manifest
Service worker registered for basic offline caching of static assets
Install prompt works on mobile Chrome
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Multi-user team login via Supabase Auth
acceptanceCriteria: Login page at /login with email+password via Supabase Auth
Middleware redirects unauthenticated users to /login
projects table has created_by UUID column linked to auth.users
Each user only sees their own projects in past projects list
Logout button in header
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys

stories.title: Contractor portal — submit quote against BOQ
acceptanceCriteria: GET /quote/[projectId] public page shows BOQ line items to contractor
Contractor enters name, company, and price per line item
Submit saves to contractor_quotes table: project_id, contractor_name, line_item_quotes JSONB
Staff can view submitted quotes on project page
TypeScript compiles, Vercel deploys
